
### hard-coded addresses? (64-bit) 

<!-- \lstset{language=C,style=small} -->
 ![](/mitigate-aslr/texfig/hardCodedAsm.figure.svg)

### hard-coded addresses? (64-bit) 

:::: {.columns}

::: {.column style="font-size: 90%; width: 30%"}

```c
int foo(long n) {
    switch (n) {
    case 0: 
    case 2:
    case 4:
    case 5:
        return 1;
    case 1:
    case 3:
        return 2;
    default:
        return 3;
    }
}
```

:::

::: {.column style="width: 68%; border-left: 2px solid black"}

```gnuassembler
foo:
	movl	$3, %eax
	cmpq	$5, %rdi
	ja	defaultCase
	jmp	*lookupTable(,%rdi,8)
        /* plus
           code for defaultCase,
           returnOne, returnTwo */
        ...
	.section	.rodata
lookupTable: /* read-only pointers: */
	.quad	returnOne
	.quad	returnTwo
	.quad	returnOne
	.quad	returnTwo
	.quad	returnOne
	.quad	returnOne
```

:::

::::



### hard-coded addresses? (64-bit) {.longcode}


:::: {.columns}

::: {.column style="font-size: 90%; width: 30%"}

```c
int foo(long n) {
    switch (n) {
    case 0: 
    case 2:
    case 4:
    case 5:
        return 1;
    case 1:
    case 3:
        return 2;
    default:
        return 3;
    }
}
```

:::

::: {.column style="width: 68%; border-left: 2px solid black"}

<pre><code>400570 &ltfoo&gt;:
b8 03 00 00 00    mov    $0x3,%eax
48 83 ff 05       cmp    $0x5,%rdi
        /* jump to defaultCase: */
77 <span class="fragment custom myem-only" data-fragment-index="1">12</span>             ja     0x40058d
        /* lookup table jump: */
ff 24 fd
<span class="fragment custom myem-only" data-fragment-index="1">18 06 40 00</span>       jmpq   *0x400618(,%rdi,8)
...
 /* lookupTable @ 0x400618 */
@ 400618: <span class="fragment custom myem-only" data-fragment-index="2">0x400588</span> /* returnOne */
@ 400620: <span class="fragment custom myem-only" data-fragment-index="2">0x400582</span> /* returnTwo */
@ 400628: <span class="fragment custom myem-only" data-fragment-index="2">0x400588</span>
@ 400630: <span class="fragment custom myem-only" data-fragment-index="2">0x400582</span>
</code></pre>

:::

::::


### hard-coded addresses? (64-bit) 


![](/mitigate-aslr/texfig/hardCodedDisasm.figure.svg)
